body:
It seems like FFMPEG is not used in EKP; it adds many indirect dependencies for packages that depend on `EnsembleKalmanProcesses`, e.g.:

```toml
[[deps.FFMPEG]]
deps = ["FFMPEG_jll"]
git-tree-sha1 = "95ecf07c2eea562b5adbd0696af6db62c0f52560"
uuid = "c87230d0-a227-11e9-1b43-d7ebe4e7570a"
version = "0.4.5"

[[deps.FFMPEG_jll]]
deps = ["Artifacts", "Bzip2_jll", "FreeType2_jll", "FriBidi_jll", "JLLWrappers", "LAME_jll", "Libdl", "Ogg_jll", "OpenSSL_jll", "Opus_jll", "PCRE2_jll", "Zlib_jll", "libaom_jll", "libass_jll", "libfdk_aac_jll", "libva_jll", "libvorbis_jll", "x264_jll", "x265_jll"]
git-tree-sha1 = "cac41ca6b2d399adfc95e51240566f8a60a80806"
uuid = "b22a6f82-2f65-5046-a5b2-351ab43fb4e5"
version = "8.1.0+0"
```

Introduced in #425. I couldn't find any references to FFMPEG [anywhere in the code](https://github.com/search?q=repo%3ACliMA%2FEnsembleKalmanProcesses.jl+FFMPEG&type=commits), so it's possible it may be removed altogether.

cc: @odunbar
title: ci: Move FFMPEG to test targets in Project.toml
